arts.ttl: Arsenal told Jurgen Klopp favourite would've made them a laughing stock but scored a hatful
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has made no bones about his admiration for West Ham star Jarrod Bowen, who one former Premier League star believes should have been a target for Arsenal

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest star hails Espirito Santo method to get best out of him – And teammate who knows him perfectly
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest striker Chris Wood has hailed manager Nuno Espirito Santo for the manner in which he’s gotten the best out of him. L’Equipe have an interview with the striker today in which he explains why he thinks it’s going so well for him under the Portuguese boss. arts.sum: Former Premier League striker Darren Bent has criticised Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard for his performances this season. "He had a little flirt where he looked like he might be back but two Premier League goals this season, three in total.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal simulated to predict huge Premier League title test
arts.sum: After losing to West Ham United on the weekend, three points against Nottingham Forest is more important than ever for Arsenal's Premier League title hopes. It was a calamitous weekend for Arsenal, with the Gunners losing 1-0 at home to West Ham while Liverpool beat Man City 2-0, meaning the Reds moved 11 points clear of Mikel Arteta's side in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stars show true colours as £30m forward flooded with messages after huge breakthrough
arts.sum: His only other two goals for the Eagles came in the Carabao Cup, with one coming in the clash against Arsenal back in December. Nketiah will now look to add to his first goal when Palace take on Ipswich Town at Selhurst Park in their next Premier League game.

arts.ttl: FA release Arne Slot statement as Liverpool punishment confirmed amid Arsenal title race
arts.sum: Slot and Hulshoff will now be forced to watch tonight's Premier League game against Newcastle United from the stands. An independent regulatory commission has now hit Slot and Hulshoff with touchline bans after they admitted charges of using an improper manner and/or using insulting and/or abusive words and/or behaviour towards both the match officials, with Slot to pay a fine of £70,000 and Hulshoff £7,000.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Singer behind Arsenal's anthem North London Forever has a VERY famous mother
arts.sum: Before each match, Gunners fans belt out part of Louis Dunford's song The Angel (North London Forever). Dunford released the song as a tribute to his home town of Islington.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s season set for failure after latest slip-up?
arts.sum: It’s been the same old story for Arsenal, as Saturday saw them lose a must-win home game to West Ham just as the opportunity to pile pressure on Liverpool presented itself. Liverpool then went on to beat Manchester City, extending their Premier League lead to 11 points.
